title: vicoa glanduligera
intro: Vicoa glanduligera, also known as the glandular vicoa, is a type of flowering plant in the family Compositae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its medicinal properties which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Vicoa glanduligera include reducing inflammation, promoting digestion, and relieving pain, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Vicoa glanduligera include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be prepared by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
